title: XFILLX's Swords
description: Adds 3 new swords with a vanilla Minecraft style and 8 additional  sword with a more Modded style.
body:
**Adds new swords such as:**

- Emerald Sword
- Lapis Sword
- Redstone Sword
- Obsidian Sword
- Slime Sword
- Magma Sword
- Phantom Sword
- Copper Sword
- Coal Sword
- Wool Sword
- Amethyst Sword

**Some of these swords have Special abilities such as:**

- Emerald Sword = Hero of The Village
- Obsidian Sword = Strength
- Slime Sword = Jump Boost
- Copper Sword = Haste
- Amethyst Sword = Speed
- Magma Sword = Fire Resistance
- Phantom Sword = Levitation

**Even Debuffs to opponents such as:**

- Slime Sword = Slowness
- Wool Sword = Levitation
